title: Unnecessary .as_str() on CString::new(port_str)
description: In wolftpm/src/device.rs (open_swtpm) and wolftpm-tss/src/connection.rs (WolfTpmSwtpm::connect), the code writes CString::new(port_str.as_str()) where port_str is a String. CString::new accepts Into<Vec<u8>>, so String satisfies it directly. The .as_str() call is a no-op coercion and should be removed: CString::new(port_str).
